response.justification: While Bogdan is an exceptionally experienced software engineer (27 years), he lacks the mandatory technical requirements for this role. His C++ experience is limited to a 2007-2008 stint at National Instruments with no hands-on C++ work in the past 15+ years. His career has focused on web/backend development using TypeScript, Node.js, and D language. He has no Windows platform development experience, no SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and critically, zero exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains. This is a fundamental skills mismatch despite his overall seniority.
strengths: Exceptional depth of software engineering knowledge across multiple domains with 27 years of professional experience and demonstrated ability to master diverse technical stacks
Proven ability to communicate complex technical concepts through workshops, talks, and open-source community leadership (GISCollective, FOSS4G presentations)
Strong full-stack development background with experience building production systems handling high volume and real-time requirements (Dunnhumby's microservices infrastructure)
concerns: C++ experience is outdated (last hands-on work in 2007-2008); modern C++ skills and Windows platform proficiency cannot be verified from this resume
Zero exposure to capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domains—the primary domain expertise requirement for the role
Career trajectory focused on web/backend development; no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle experience or Windows-based system development required for capital markets systems

key_factors.factor: Overall software engineering maturity and communication ability
